mechanism_narrative: Positive payroll momentum raises expected household income and aggregate earnings, so higher recent PAYEMS growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2007-02 was 137410 thousand
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth does not produce a positive 20-day return spread versus lower growth observations, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 for any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts breakdown signals weakening residential investment and tighter household balance sheets, reducing expected cyclical earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2007-01 was 1408 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST breakdowns are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: High policy rates combined with rising consumer prices force investors to discount cash flows at higher rates without receiving immediate real income relief, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with inflation pressure
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-rate high-inflation trigger has nonnegative average 20-day excess returns versus baseline in walk-forward tests, or if either leg alone fully explains the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating retail sales indicate resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days after the signal appears.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2007-02 was 370495 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if triggered positive RSAFS accelerations produce a lower 5-day average S&P 500 return than non-triggered observations or if hit rate is below 50% over two consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production contraction indicates falling factory output and operating leverage pressure, so negative INDPRO momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or if the conditional mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate from a low base signals that labor-market slack is emerging after the expansion has matured, reducing earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points from its trailing 12-month low
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2007-02 was 4.5 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are not associated with lower 60-day forward returns than the full sample, or if the negative signal has a hit rate below 50% in recession-adjacent windows.

mechanism_narrative: Restrictive policy rates damage equity returns most when housing activity is already weakening, because credit-sensitive demand transmits rate pressure into construction, consumption, and bank-risk channels.
evidence_refs: fact:2007-03-15 snapshot shows FEDFUNDS above 5% and HOUST near 1408 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-HOUST trigger does not underperform cases with high FEDFUNDS alone over 60 trading days, or if interaction terms are statistically insignificant at the 10% level.

mechanism_narrative: Weak real GDP growth reduces expected aggregate sales and profit growth, so a GDP growth slowdown below trend predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest vintage available at the decision date was 2006-10
failure_condition: Reject if low GDPC1 growth triggers have equal or higher 60-day forward S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations after vintage alignment, or if out-of-sample directional accuracy is below 50%.
